reasoning: Polymarket priced this at 0.08 out of the gate, and since then Minecraft and potentially Superman/other summer slate blockbusters have banked huge numbers (Minecraft >$280M domestic by mid-April). Because Wicked: For Good releases late in the year (November 21), it has less than 40 days to accumulate its calendar gross for 2025. To win, it would need to outgross the entire domestic run of major spring/summer hits like A Minecraft Movie, Superman, Jurassic World, and Lilo & Stitch in just five weeks, while fending off competition from Avatar: Fire and Ash and Zootopia 2. Box Office Mojo current projections/summaries have it tracking around #6 for 2025 calendar gross, significantly trailing the top spring films. Therefore, 4% is a well-founded estimate reflecting the steep uphill climb required.
